body_transformation: Voltorb's rounded head elongates slightly with a matte charcoal base, its stubby legs now clad in molten gold armor plating that traces the original limb structure. The curled tail tip becomes a flickering flame-tipped spiral, its texture mimicking cracked magma with glowing amber fissures. Pointed ears gain ember-scaled ridges along their inner curves, while the compact body surface develops a heat-haze distortion over its light gray base. Small smoke trails emerge from joint crevices, maintaining the low stance and quadrupedal posture without altering structural proportions.
signature_feature: Tail tip: molten gold flame spiral with cracked magma texture and amber glow.
